## Area

- [ ] Research logic
- [ ] Data or reproducibility
- [ ] Portfolio construction
- [ ] Risk attribution
- [ ] Documentation

## Observation

What looks wrong, unclear, or worth improving?

## Evidence

Relevant file, command, output, metric, or report.

## Proposed next step

What should be changed or checked next?
